The '''''Pacifier''-class assault boat''' was a [[Transport/Legends|transport]] manufactured by [[Telgorn Corporation/Legends|Telgorn Corporation]]. They were utilized by the [[Cavrilhu Pirates]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Specter of the Past]]'' {{Ab|Specter of the Past (unabridged audiobook)}}
